outreach_subject: A European take on resilient homes in Bel-Air

replies.subject: RE: A European take on resilient homes in Bel-Air
replies.body:
Hello,

 

Thank you for your  interest in Canyon News. 

 

We have a feature article that we can offer you for only $900. However, it is currently on special for $225 for 1 year on our website. 

 

NO EXPLICIT or ILLEGAL CONTENT is allowed. Full payment is required before any content can be published per company policy. Once received (payment and article), content is published within 24 hours and you will receive an email with a link within 24 hours to view. 

 

A phone number is required for all clients on file per company policy. 

 

To place your order go to canyon-news.com/advertising and use the coupon code: freedom22! 

 

Have a great night! 😊

Ankita

 

Canyon News

9701 Wilshire Boulevard, 10th Floor

Beverly Hills, CA 90212

Telephone: (310) 277-6017 (Monday through Friday 9-5)

Facsimile: (310) 277-6018

Text: (213) 910-1370 (24 hours)

WhatsApp: (213) 910-1370 (24 hours)

Email:  <mailto:hello@canyon-news.com> hello@canyon-news.com (24 hours)

URL: canyon-news.com

OPEN 24 HOURS: We do not accept voice calls outside phone hours. Please use text, WhatsApp or email us.

 

Thank you for reading Canyon News, the only unbiased newspaper in all of Southern California.

 

This email and any files transmitted with it are confidential and intended solely for the use of the individual or entity to whom they are addressed. If you have received this email in error please notify the system manager. This message contains confidential information and is intended only for the individual named. If you are not the named addressee you should not disseminate, distribute or copy this e-mail. Please notify the sender immediately by e-mail if you have received this e-mail by mistake and delete this e-mail from your system. If you are not the intended recipient you are notified that disclosing, copying, distributing or taking any action in reliance on the contents of this information is strictly prohibited.

 

 

 

 

 

-----Original Message-----
From: Lisa Monelli <info@myvilla.la> 
Sent: Tuesday, June 2, 2026 11:45 PM
To: hello@canyon-news.com
Subject: A European take on resilient homes in Bel-Air

 

Hello,

 

I follow Canyon News for the way you cover Bel-Air, Beverly Hills, and Brentwood from the inside — the homes, the people, and how this corner of LA keeps reinventing what living well looks like.

 

A quick hello from our side: at My Villa, we bring European construction resilience and the Italian way of living to homes in Los Angeles — designed in exposed reinforced concrete, cemento a vista. In Europe, building for durability and seismic performance has been the default for generations, long before California asked for it.

 

It feels timely for your readers: as insurability and fire-resilience quietly redefine what a luxury home means on these hillsides, the conversation is shifting from finishes to how a house is actually built to last.

 

I'd be glad to share a first look at a current build — renders and photos — or set up a short talk with our founder, Paolo Mezzalama.

 

Would a feature like this interest your readers?

 

Best,

Lisa Monelli

My Villa Media Team

 <mailto:info@myvilla.la> info@myvilla.la · myvilla.la
